data.title: Microvast Schedules Fourth Quarter Earnings Call
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Microvast Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MVST), a prominent player in advanced battery technologies, announced that it will release its financial results for the entirety of 2025 and the fourth quarter after the market closes on Monday, March 16, 2026. This global leader's report will provide insight into its performance over the year, offering stakeholders valuable information to assess the company's trajectory and position in the market.

data.title: Investview Announces Official Launch of myLife Wellness, Establishing a New Consumer Health & Wellness Business Unit
data.description: Investview, Inc. (OTCQB: INVU) based in Haverford, PA, revealed the launch of myLife Wellness, a consumer health and wellness division on March 13, 2026. This unit, operated under Renu Laboratories, will market and sell specialized wellness products. The move aligns with Investview's strategy as a diversified financial technology and consumer products company.

data.title: CUPE Ontario and Ontario NDP Challenge Conservatives’ Claims on Bill 60 and Water Privatization With Damning Legal Opinion
data.description: In Toronto, the true intentions behind the Ford Conservatives' plans to privatize Ontario's water were revealed as CUPE Ontario and the Ontario NDP, along with a lawyer from Goldblatt Partners LLP, disclosed a legal opinion on Bill 60, the Fighting Delays, Building Faster Act, 2025. The legal review of Schedule 16 of Bill 60 was commissioned by CUPE Ontario in their opposition to the Ford government's efforts to privatize publicly owned regional water systems.

Volland SPX Spot-Vol Beta: -0.77 This gauge measures how much the VIX is reacting relative to the S&P 500’s price move. A reading of -0.77 suggests volatility is under-reacting, meaning options traders are not aggressively increasing downside protection despite the market move.

data.title: 35% surge in price of Trump Meme Coin, holders boosting trading volume to earn exclusive event access in Solana.
data.description: The meme coin associated with President Donald Trump has seen a significant increase of 35% in its value. Top holders of this coin are accumulating Solana-based tokens to gain entry to a special event.

data.title: Dickey’s Barbecue Pit Celebrates 10 Years in Communities Across the Country During 85th Anniversary Year
data.description: Dickey’s Barbecue Pit is commemorating 85 years of serving authentic Texas barbecue, while multiple locations in various communities are celebrating a significant milestone of 10 years in operation. Restaurants in Kalispell, Montana; Riverview (Tampa), Florida; Lafayette, Louisiana; Spokane Valley, Washington; Odessa-Midland, Texas; Dothan, Alabama; and Hilliard, Ohio, are marking a decade of providing championship-style barbecue to guests and catering local events.

data.title: Northeastern Illinois University hosts "Echoes of Silence: Portraits of Pain, Reflections of Resilience."
data.description: In Chicago, Northeastern Illinois University's Genocide and Human Rights in Africa and the Diaspora (GHRAD) Center is currently showcasing a photography exhibit titled "Echoes of Silence." This exhibit focuses on survivors of the 1972 genocide in Burundi, Africa. The exhibit features portraits capturing the pain and reflections of those who endured the genocide. The GHRAD Center aims to shed light on the experiences of survivors through these powerful images. This exhibit marks a significant moment in highlighting the atrocities faced by individuals during the genocide.

data.title: Bishop Legal Attorney Raymond Bishop Secures Multimillion-Dollar Settlement in Sea-Tac Airport Ramp Agent Injury Case
data.description: Raymond Bishop, an attorney at Bishop Legal, recently disclosed the settlement of a complex lawsuit related to a severe workplace accident at Seattle–Tacoma International Airport (Sea-Tac) that occurred on September 16, 2022. The announcement was made in Seattle on March 13, 2026, /PRNewswire. The settlement was reached after extensive legal proceedings involving multiple parties affected by the incident. The attorney did not disclose the specific details of the settlement but confirmed that it was a significant resolution. The accident that took place at Sea-Tac on the mentioned date had a profound impact on those involved, including Tia Valentine, who was working at the time.

data.title: Seizing oil tankers by Trump costs U.S. tens of millions; maintaining one ship cost $47 million.
data.description: President Trump previously expressed optimism about profiting from seizing tankers, however, it has been revealed that the expense of upkeep for a single deteriorating ship has already exceeded $47 million.

China-US trade talks to begin on Sunday It’s almost six months since the last round of economic and trade talks between China and the US. Now delegations from both countries are set to meet in Paris. Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng will lead the Chinese delegation to France.

data.title: Tevogen Reaffirms Capital Discipline as Lead Investor Maintains Holdings and Company Limits Share Utilization
data.description: Tevogen is focusing on maintaining strict control over capital, limiting the use of shares, and showcasing significant insider ownership. The company is also considering potential acquisitions as part of their strategy to accurately represent the value of their assets.
